title: Liezi: The Yang Zhu Chapter
description: The most hedonistic text in Chinese philosophy: since we all die, why not pursue pleasure?
introduction: The most hedonistic text in Chinese philosophy: since we all die, why not pursue pleasure?

translation.original_text: 百年壽之大齊，得百年者千無一焉。
translation.text: A hundred years is the great limit of the longest life, but not one in a thousand ever reaches it.
